gradient.$description: Terminal light-mode gradient tokens. Translates the Terminal brand into opaque pastel tints — soft cyan and mint washes evoking tinted terminal paper printouts.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — dark cyan to deep teal, the primary identity on bright surfaces. Uses horizontal direction (centerLeft → centerRight).

accent.$description: Accent gradient — dark gray to deep teal, accent gradient on bright surfaces.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — soft cyan wash, visible and harmonious on white and off-white surfaces.

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary — deeper cyan tint for primary-accented containers.

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent — mint tint for accent-accented containers.
